findings.title: Legacy dialog reference: ItemDialog
findings.detail: Large modal dialog is still present or referenced. Some references may be explicit fallback paths.
findings.recommendation: Primary workflows should open DocumentTab/MainWindow open_* methods. Keep only explicit Legacy*/fallback or small utility dialogs.

findings.title: QDialog class: QuickOpenDialog
findings.detail: Class inherits QDialog. This may be acceptable for small utility dialogs, but CRUD/document screens should be tabs.
findings.recommendation: If this is CRUD/document/edit workflow, migrate to BaseDocumentTab; otherwise document it as allowed utility dialog.

findings.title: Direct QSettings in UI/feature layer
findings.detail: UI/feature layer should use settings_service/preferences wrappers, not QSettings directly.
findings.recommendation: Move persistence to settings_service or a scoped preferences helper using user/branch/profile.
